summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new LD Finance features completed. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new components and features are working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings in console about nested HTML elements (th inside span, td inside span) - cosmetic issue, table renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Snowball endpoint correctly sorts debts by current_amount ascending (smallest first)
Snowball calculation includes interest accrual and payment redistribution when debts are paid off
Categories endpoint correctly merges default categories with custom global and user-specific categories
Messages are correctly scoped by month (YYYY-MM format) and user
AnimatedLogo component uses CSS transitions with phase-based state changes for LD->Holdings->Finance animation
AdvisorChat component properly integrated into Dashboard with message sending and task toggle functionality
seed_data_creation: Test users, sessions, and debts created/cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested and working: 1) AnimatedLogo with LD->Holdings->Finance animation on Landing and Layout navbar, 2) Custom categories with admin CRUD and user-specific categories, 3) AdvisorChat component on Dashboard with monthly messages/tasks, 4) Enhanced debt module with snowball method including min_payment, interest_rate, month-by-month table, and pie chart. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection.
tests_passed: API health check /api/
GET /api/debts/snowball returns empty schedule for no debts
POST /api/debts creates debt with min_payment field
GET /api/debts/snowball returns snowball calculation with schedule, debts sorted by balance ascending
GET /api/categories returns default income and expense categories plus custom categories
POST /api/admin/categories creates global custom category
DELETE /api/admin/categories/{category_id} deletes category
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/categories creates user-specific category
Non-admin users blocked from creating categories (403)
GET /api/messages returns messages for user for a month
POST /api/messages creates message with is_task and month fields
PUT /api/messages/{message_id}/complete toggles task completion
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/messages returns user messages for admin
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/messages sends admin message to user
Messages correctly filtered by month parameter
Debt CRUD with all fields including min_payment and interest_rate
Landing page shows AnimatedLogo component with LD text
Layout navbar shows AnimatedLogo component
Debts page has 3 tabs - Resumen, Bola de Nieve, Mis Deudas
Debts page shows pie chart in Resumen tab
Debts page shows snowball month-by-month table
Dashboard page shows AdvisorChat component with message input
Transactions page fetches categories from /api/categories
Admin page shows category management section
Admin page shows Chat tab in user detail

animated_logo.details: AnimatedLogo component shows LD text with animated transition to Holdings then Finance. Present on Landing page and Layout navbar.

custom_categories.details: Admin can create/delete global categories. Admin can create user-specific categories. Categories endpoint returns merged list of defaults + custom.

advisor_chat.details: AdvisorChat component on Dashboard shows messages filtered by month. Users can send messages and toggle task completion. Admin can view user messages and send messages/tasks.

debt_snowball.details: Debts page has 3 tabs. Resumen shows pie chart and summary cards. Bola de Nieve shows month-by-month payment schedule. Mis Deudas shows debt list with progress bars. Snowball endpoint calculates payment schedule with interest and payment redistribution.
